name: Shopify
notes: The primary platform your other tools support. Apply: https://www.shopify.com/affiliates. Hosted on Impact — has API for earnings tracking.

name: BigCommerce
commission: 200% of first monthly payment + bounty tiers (one-time)
notes: Major alternative for mid-market and enterprise merchants that find Shopify restrictive. Apply: https://www.bigcommerce.com/partners/affiliate-program/. Hosted on Impact.

name: Klaviyo
notes: Industry standard for ecommerce email/SMS. Recently expanded into product reviews. K:Partners program relaunched for 2026. Apply: https://www.klaviyo.com/partner-program

name: Gorgias
commission: 20% recurring (first 2 years unless VIP Partner unlocks lifetime)
notes: Ecom-specific helpdesk. Per-ticket pricing is the big selling point for scaling teams. Apply: https://www.gorgias.com/partners

name: Triple Whale
notes: Shopify-only. Powerhouse for stores doing $10M+. Note 6-month commission cap. Apply: https://www.triplewhale.com/partners

name: Postscript
notes: Plug-and-play SMS marketing for Shopify. Easier + more affordable than competitors. Apply: https://postscript.io/partners

name: Recharge (getrecharge.com)
notes: Proven subscription leader with 97% renewal rate — high-trust recommendation. Apply: https://rechargepayments.com/partners/

name: Yotpo
notes: Enterprise-grade all-in-one for reviews, SMS, loyalty, and subscriptions. Apply: https://www.yotpo.com/partners/

name: Okendo
notes: Favored for 'Superfans' approach and deep UGC focus. Strong alternative to Yotpo for DTC brands. Apply: https://www.okendo.io/partners

name: Semrush
notes: Critical for merchants focused on organic growth. High bounty. Apply: https://www.semrush.com/lp/affiliate-program/en/. Hosted on Impact.

name: HubSpot
commission: 30% recurring (up to 1 year of customer payments)
notes: Good for B2B ecommerce and merchants needing advanced CRM. Apply: https://www.hubspot.com/partners/affiliates. Hosted on Impact.

name: Omnisend
notes: Strong Klaviyo alternative — often more cost-effective for smaller merchants. Apply: https://www.omnisend.com/affiliate-program

name: Jotform (Agency)
notes: Custom order forms + lead capture beyond standard store capabilities. APPLY FOR AGENCY TIER not standard. Apply: https://www.jotform.com/affiliate-program/

name: Tidio
notes: Strong Gorgias alternative for smaller businesses. More affordable entry point + AI chatbots. Apply: https://www.tidio.com/partners/

name: WP Engine
notes: For store owners running WooCommerce. High-paying bounties. Hosted on ShareASale (has API). Apply: https://wpengine.com/affiliates/
